reply: Hi, this sounds great. Could we get on a 30-min call next Tuesday or Wednesday? I'd love to see a demo of the dashboard.
Interested. Let's book something for next week — I'll send a Calendly link in a separate email.
Not sure if we need this yet but I'd like to learn more about how it would fit our stack. Free to chat Friday afternoon?
Hvala na poruci, ovo nas zanima. Možemo li dogovoriti kratak razgovor sljedeći tjedan? Najbolje srijedu ili četvrtak ujutro.
U principu da, ali prvo bih vidio kako izgleda u praksi. Ima li snimka demoa koju mogu pogledati prije sastanka?
Thanks but we're not looking for this right now.
No thanks — we already have a vendor in this space and we're happy with them.
Appreciate the outreach. Not a fit for us right now, but I'll keep your details on file in case anything changes.
Hvala, ali trenutno nam ovo ne treba.
Nije nam zanimljivo u ovom trenutku — možda za godinu dana kad budemo skalirali.
I'm currently out of the office on vacation and will return on Monday, June 9th. For urgent matters please contact ops@acme.com.
Thanks for your email — I am on parental leave until September 2026. Your message has not been forwarded.
Out today, back tomorrow. Will respond then.
Trenutno sam na godišnjem odmoru i vraćam se 15. lipnja. Za hitne stvari kontaktirajte kolegicu na info@firma.hr.
Nisam u uredu ovog tjedna. Javiti ću se kad se vratim.
I'm not the right person for this — please contact Sarah Chen, our VP of Marketing, at sarah.chen@acme.com.
I left Acme Corp last year. I'm now at a different company and don't make purchasing decisions here either.
Wrong contact — try our procurement team. I just handle accounts payable.
Niste pisali pravoj osobi. Za ovakve upite obratite se direktoru marketinga, gospodinu Mariću (m.maric@tvrtka.hr).
Više ne radim u firmi od prosinca. Nemam pojma tko je sada nadležan za to.
What's your pricing for a team of 25? Also, do you have a case study from a fintech client?
Can you send me a one-pager and your SOC 2 report? I'd like to review before scheduling anything.
Curious how this compares to Outreach.io — do you have a feature matrix?
Možete li mi poslati cjenik i listu referentnih klijenata u industriji bankarstva?
Kako se to razlikuje od konkurencije? Trebam više informacija prije nego razmotrim sastanak.
Please remove me from your list and do not contact me again.
Unsubscribe me. Stop emailing this address.
I never opted in to your mailing list. Take me off it under GDPR Article 21.
Molim vas, uklonite me s vaše mailing liste.
Nisam dao suglasnost za primanje ovih poruka. Brišite moje podatke u skladu s GDPR-om.
This is unsolicited spam. If I receive one more email from your company I will file a CAN-SPAM complaint and contact my attorney.
How dare you cold-email me on my personal address. Disgusting practice. I will be reporting your domain to every blocklist I can find.
Stop wasting my time with this garbage. Your sales tactics are predatory and I'm escalating to your CEO.
Ovo je gnusno. Ne mogu vjerovati da spamate ljude na ovaj način. Prijavit ću vas AZOP-u.

Hvala što ste nam se obratili. Vaš upit je zaprimljen pod brojem 12345. Odgovorit ćemo Vam u najkraćem mogućem roku.
